fields.title: Tests for thread tools
fields.description: Create comprehensive tests for ThreadCatalog service, find_thread, read_thread, and renderers.
fields.design: Create test files: test/thread-service.test.ts for ThreadCatalog service, test/thread-search.test.ts for find_thread logic, test/thread-read.test.ts for read_thread logic, test/thread-renderer.test.ts for TUI renderers. Use @effect/vitest patterns. Create test fixtures: simple linear session, session with parentSession, branched session, compacted session, tool-heavy session, hidden bash output, custom tau messages, named session. Test id/path resolution, relevance scoring, transcript formatting, truncation behavior, ambiguity detection, title derivation. Extend existing test/agent-tool-allowlist.test.ts to verify thread tools in allowlists.
